name: DunCrew Integration
description: DunCrew Nexus system integration for OpenClaw — SOP-driven task execution, experience tracking, and adaptive rule injection.

nexusDataDir.description: Directory for Nexus persistent data (NEXUS.md, experience logs, rules)

enableSOPInjection.description: Inject SOP roadmap into agent context before each prompt

enableAnaphoraResolution.description: Track recent entities (files, commands, queries) for pronoun resolution

enableExperienceRecording.description: Record success/failure experience after task completion

enableGenePool.description: Enable Gene Pool self-healing: error pattern matching and gene harvesting

enableSOPEvolution.description: Track SOP fitness and inject improvement hints; allow Agent-driven SOP rewrite

enableNexusCatalog.description: Inject Nexus catalog when no Nexus is active, enabling Agent-driven Nexus selection

maxSOPContentLength.description: Maximum characters of SOP content to inject

recentEntityExpireMs.description: How long recent entities remain valid (ms, default 5min)

nexusDataDir.label: Nexus Data Directory
nexusDataDir.help: Where Nexus files are stored. Defaults to extension data directory.

enableSOPInjection.label: SOP Injection
enableSOPInjection.help: Inject active Nexus SOP into agent context for guided execution

enableAnaphoraResolution.label: Anaphora Resolution
enableAnaphoraResolution.help: Track recently used files/commands to resolve pronouns like 'it', 'that file'

enableExperienceRecording.label: Experience Recording
enableExperienceRecording.help: Automatically log task outcomes to Nexus experience files

enableGenePool.label: Gene Pool
enableGenePool.help: Self-healing system: match error patterns to known fixes, harvest new repair genes

enableSOPEvolution.label: SOP Evolution
enableSOPEvolution.help: Track execution fitness and let the Agent improve SOP based on historical data

enableNexusCatalog.label: Nexus Catalog
enableNexusCatalog.help: Show available Nexuses to the Agent when none is active, enabling intelligent selection
